title: pteris excelsa var. inaequalis
intro: Pteris excelsa var. inaequalis is a variety of the Pteris excelsa fern species, specifically known for its uneven fronds. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
